name: BACKLOG-002
title: philosophy.md heading hierarchy: promote to # H1 and shift subsections to ##
description: philosophy.md starts with a blank line + stray --- + ## Philosophy (H2) while all other policy files use # H1. Fix: (1) remove leading blank + ---, (2) ## Philosophy → # Philosophy, (3) ### subsections → ## subsections. This makes all four policy files share identical heading hierarchy. Required before generate-claude-md.sh produces a clean verbatim concatenation.
